commands.command: node $SNAP_SHARED_DIR/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --approve-builds --directory approved-app # --approve-builds auto-approves and runs the gated build script (core-js)

commands: cat approved-app/pnpm-workspace.yaml # approval recorded under allowBuilds

commands.command: node $SNAP_SHARED_DIR/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --directory default-app # default run surfaces the gated build with guidance, leaving it unapproved

commands: cat default-app/pnpm-workspace.yaml # no allowBuilds, the build was not run
cd default-app && node $SNAP_SHARED_DIR/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp pm approve-builds core-js # the guidance's `vp pm approve-builds` command approves the gated build
cat default-app/pnpm-workspace.yaml # core-js is now allowed under allowBuilds
